description.unified: Restores HP to all allies, increases [Magic Block Chance by 300->Heal Rate by 25%] for 4sec, and [additionally restores HP every 1sec->reduces M.DMG they take by 15% for 5 sec]. If the target’s HP is 50% or lower, healing is increased by [x 1.5->50%].

Grants a shield that absorbs damage for 15sec to [4 ally with the lowest current HP->the ally with the lowest HP]. The shielded target [takes 15% reduced damage from non-hero enemies->grants Immunity to CC, increases ATK, heals HP every sec, takes 30% reduced damage from Non-Hero targets and increases DMG dealt to Non-Hero enemies by 15%].

Deals M.DMG to nearby enemies and knocks them down for [3 sec->1.8sec]. Then, for 12sec, increases [Mana recovery per second->heals HP by 15% of Max HP and recovers 2 orbs of Mana] of all allies except self by 30%, and every 4sec, a vortex erupts at a random enemy, dealing M.DMG and knocking them down for [2 sec->1.2sec].
All allies’ M.DEF increases by 56*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 5% of Laias’s M.DEF, and Magic Crit Resistance increases by 250.

dark.unified: The target’s Mana recovery per second increases by 0%.
Magic Defense increase rate increases by [20%->40%], and Magic Critical Resistance increases by [150->100].

description.unified: Increases all allies' Healing by {0}% and their Magic Defense by 5% of Laias's Attack. Additionally, every 5 seconds, heals the ally in the worst HP condition by {1}% of Laias's Attack.
[Festival of the Flow] The Whirlpool effect targets 2 enemies and all allies recover {0} additional Mana.
